body.title: [sprint] Deep-freeze dead code + duplicate artifact trees to ~/TheIgorsProject
body.description:
**Problem:** Once the genuinely-new artifacts are absorbed (the absorb/reconstruct tickets), the remaining dead CODE and duplicate artifact trees across the generations should be deep-frozen to the single freeze home `~/TheIgorsProject` (per the lineage intent: dead code freezes, it is not deleted). The theigors ticket/decision corpus exists in TRIPLICATE (archive/lab/theigors, TheIgorsProject/{lab/theigors,theigors}, cert-walks/W1/lab/theigors) — migrate-once is done by the absorb tickets, so the redundant trees + retired code (utility_closet, design_docs_for_igor .dsb, igor memory modules) freeze. Folds in T-cleanup-audit-old-projects.
**Proposed shape:** GATED on all absorb tickets verified (T-absorb-adc-era-decisions, T-absorb-palace-slates, T-absorb-architecture-intent-points, T-reconstruct-palace-pointer-tickets — gate field names T-absorb-architecture-intent-points; the others are listed here as preconditions and re-verified at execution). Relocate the dead-code/dupe trees into a clean `~/TheIgorsProject/<generation>/` freeze layout. Do NOT freeze anything still absorb-pending or still live. Verify each source is either already-absorbed-into-UU or genuinely dead before moving.
**Affected files:** moves under ~/TheIgors.archive, ~/TheIgorsProject, ~/TheIgors-cert-walks, ~/TheIgors, ~/.TheIgors (artifact/code trees only — NOT the dead bulk, that is the delete ticket). No repo code changes.
**Design rules:** [[feedback_delete_after_successful_merge]] (migrate->VERIFY->then relocate source; never freeze un-absorbed artifacts); [[feedback_git_stash_hidden_divergent_state]] (no stash); deep-freeze dead->TheIgorsProject (lineage intent); HIGH-inertia relocation — Akien pre-approved the absorb->freeze->delete sequence 2026-06-28. **NEVER FOLLOW SYMLINKS** (operate with `-h`/`find -type f -o -type d`, never `cp -L`/`rsync -L`): the .TheIgors sweep flagged symlinks (cc_channel, Igor-wild-0001) pointing into LIVE ~/.unseen_university — following one would relocate live runtime state.
**Scope boundary:** IN — dead code + verified-duplicate artifact trees -> ~/TheIgorsProject freeze. OUT — the dead bulk delete (separate gated ticket: datacenter_logs, venvs, caches); any artifact not yet verified-absorbed; ~/.unseen_university live runtime (handled with care in the delete ticket).
**Test plan:** (1) Before any move, assert each artifact tree being frozen has its content already in UU (re-run the absorb dedup checks; 0 missing). (2) After freeze, ~/TheIgorsProject contains the relocated trees under a clean per-generation layout. (3) No un-absorbed artifact was frozen (the absorb dedup checks still pass post-move). (4) Originating source dirs no longer contain duplicate live artifact stores.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
